queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM world_state.ingestedAssets WHERE assetId IN (SELECT assetId FROM orchestration_runs WHERE runId = $1)
SELECT localFirstProfile.enabled FROM local_first_profile WHERE localFirstProfile.enabled = true
SELECT multiPipelineSeal.pipelines FROM multi_pipeline_seal WHERE multiPipelineSeal.sealed = true
SELECT components FROM world_state WHERE components IS NOT NULL
SELECT snapshotHash FROM execution_traces WHERE snapshotHash IS NOT NULL ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
